base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of skeleton_scorpion_knight_variants — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Skeleton class — 3 color variants (red-skull/white-skull/green-skull). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Skeleton class — 3 color variants (red-skull/white-skull/green-skull); mid-tier undead melee enemy
